_metadata.description: Football Knowledge Layer - Team Information for WC2026

tournament_history.zh: 3次世界杯冠军（1978、1986、2022），2022年卡塔尔世界杯冠军，15次参赛
tournament_history.en: 3x World Cup Champion (1978, 1986, 2022), 2022 Qatar Champions, 19 appearances

tactical_info.style_zh: 防守反击与控球并重，中场控制力强，定位球威胁大
tactical_info.style_en: Balanced defense-counter and possession, strong midfield control, dangerous set-pieces

ai_impact.description_zh: 夺冠热门，技术与经验兼备
ai_impact.description_en: Championship favorite, balanced technique and experience

tournament_history.en: 5x World Cup Champion (1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, 2002), most titles ever

tactical_info.style_zh: 进攻华丽，技术流，代表南美足球精髓

ai_impact.description_zh: 传统强队，进攻火力强大
ai_impact.description_en: Traditional powerhouse with devastating attack
